recommendations.title: Scale the checkout-consumer pipeline to relieve Kafka lag
recommendations.description: Kafka consumer lag reached 125000 and created downstream latency and error spikes.
recommendations.action: Increase consumer concurrency and verify partitions for the ecommerce-events topic.

recommendations.title: Redact PII and credential values in user-service logging
recommendations.description: PII and credential values were exposed in logs during repeated access attempts.
recommendations.action: Redact PII fields and credential strings before emitting logs, then rotate any exposed credentials.
